title: Transcript:Artur Hosidius
wikitext:
{{Transcript|npc}}
{{Transcript list|Artur Hosidius|Elena Hosidius}}

==Standard dialogue==
===After the completion of [[The Depths of Despair]]===
* '''Player:''' Hello again Artur.
* '''Artur Hosidius:''' Hello [player name]. Thanks for your help in recovering the Accord.
* '''Player:''' No problem.
* {{topt|Why is the Accord important?}}
** '''Player:''' Why is the Accord important?
** '''Artur Hosidius:''' The signing of the Accord marked the start of a golden age. Once the Royal Lords replaced the Council of Elders, Kourend prospered like never before.
** '''Player:''' But that was a long time ago. Why does it matter now?
** '''Artur Hosidius:''' Because I think it's time for another golden age. The Kourend Council, like the Council of Elders before them, have failed to do a good job in running this kingdom.
** '''Player:''' And you think the five houses would do a better job?
** '''Artur Hosidius:''' Exactly.
** {{topt|What makes you say the council have done a bad job?}}
*** '''Player:''' What makes you say the Council have done a bad job?
*** '''Artur Hosidius:''' More crime. Fewer homes. More illness. Loss of jobs. The list goes on.
*** '''Player:''' But aren't the five houses partially to blame as well? They rule the cities.
*** '''Artur Hosidius:''' The Council sets the laws and the Council sets the budgets. We have to do as they say, just like everyone else.
*** '''Player:''' Hmmm, fair enough. Anyway, we'd better get off.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Fair enough. See you later.}}
*** '''Player:''' Fair enough. See you later.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Goodbye.}}
** '''Player:''' Goodbye.
** {{tact|end}}

===After the completion of [[A Kingdom Divided]]===
* '''Player:''' Hello there Artur. Actually... I guess I should say Your Majesty now.
* '''King Artur Hosidius:''' For you friend, Artur is fine.
* '''Elena Hosidius:''' You should not dispense formalities Artur. A king should command respect.
* '''King Artur Hosidius:''' I can command respect without using fancy titles, mother.
* '''Player:''' So, how are you doing?
* '''King Artur Hosidius:''' I have a lot of responsibility now. There's much to learn and not much time to learn it in. The loss of father still weighs heavily on me as well.
* '''King Artur Hosidius:''' Still, I am well supported by those around me. I'm sure that with their help, I can be the ruler the people deserve.
* '''Player:''' I'm sure you can as well. Anyway, I'll let you get on with your work.
* '''King Artur Hosidius:''' Until next time.
* {{tcond|If the player has lost [[lunch by the lancalliums]]:}}
** '''King Artur Hosidius:''' Before you go, my father would have wanted you to have this.
** {{tact|receives=[[lunch by the lancalliums]]}}
* {{tact|end}}
